stemHtml: What can happen to the aeroplane structure flying at a speed just exceeding V<sub>A</sub>?

options.a: It will collapse if a turn is made.
options.b: It may suffer permanent deformation if the elevator is fully deflected upwards.
options.c: It may suffer permanent deformation because the flight is performed at too large dynamic pressure.
options.d: It may break if the elevator is fully deflected upwards.
